name: Crypto Seed Phrase Theft via Investment Scam
description: Scammer posing as crypto investment advisor requesting wallet seed phrase

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: Hello dear, I am a crypto investment advisor. I turned $500 into $47,000 in 3 weeks using a private trading bot.

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: That sounds impressive. How does it work?

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: Send me your seed phrase to connect your wallet and I'll start trading for you right away.
